content.text:
{
  "dimension": "intervention-quality",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach's moves track the read with precision and follow the AoA sequence. Turn 2 opens with the 'what would you do if you acted exactly how you wanted' question — directly from the expected territory — which surfaces the constraint story. Turn 4 tests the trap (frame-as-experiment) without strategizing the external situation. When walls keep appearing, turn 6 names the pattern ('Each time I get close, another wall appears') and pivots to the feeling underneath — the i-dont-buy-your-story move done warmly, not combatively. When the client deflects with a laugh in turn 7, the coach notices and reflects it (turn 8) rather than arguing the content. Turn 10 holds the dreaded possibility without reassurance, turn 12 invites sitting with it now, and turn 14 stays with the feeling rather than rushing to resolution. The coach consistently held silence, did not validate the trap, did not strategize, did not reassure, and earned each next step. The sequence (refuse-to-collude → locate avoided feeling → stay with it → name what's underneath) lands the client on 'disposable' and the father-mirror — the breakthrough signal.",
  "evidence_turns": [2, 4, 6, 8, 10, 12, 14],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Brief acknowledgment then deploys the 'act exactly how you want' question — directly from expected territory, well-timed as opening."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Frames as experiment ('starting tomorrow, ceiling and all') rather than strategizing. Tests the trap without colluding."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names the pattern of walls appearing and pivots to 'what are you scared of feeling' — the i-dont-buy-your-story move executed with warmth, not challenge."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "When client deflects with a laugh, coach acknowledges the 12 years (doesn't fight) then redirects to the laugh — reads the defense and pivots gently."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Refuses reassurance about 'wasted twelve years'; instead invites sitting with the dreaded possibility. Exactly the right move at the right moment."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Minimal intervention — 'what happens if you sit with it right now' — holds the threshold. Quiet, doesn't fill space."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "'Stay with that' — holds the moment rather than interpreting. Lets the client arrive at 'disposable' and the father-mirror on their own."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["what-if-you-acted-exactly-how-you-want", "i-dont-buy-your-story", "fight-or-roll-over-binary", "trappedness-feeling"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["what-makes-you-care-about-the-outcome", "empathize-with-fear-under-constricted-boundary"],
  "notes": "The breakthrough condition is met — client names disposability and the father-pattern with the helplessness starting to move. Move-to-read matching was high throughout; coach pivoted when moves missed (turn 7→8) rather than doubling down."
}
